dashboard.overviewSubtitle: Here's an overview of your venue's performance.
dashboard.noCourtsFound: No courts found. Add a venue to see live status.
dashboard.noPerformanceData: No performance data for this period yet.

venues.title: Venues
venues.subtitle: Manage your sports venues
venues.noVenuesDesc: Add your first venue to start listing courts and receiving bookings.

courts.title: My Venues
courts.subtitle: Manage your sports venues and courts in one place.
courts.noCourtsDesc: Add courts to start publishing availability and receiving bookings.
courts.noVenuesDesc: Add your first venue to start receiving bookings.
courts.noCourtsAddedYet: No courts added yet. Add your first court to this venue.
courts.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this court?
courts.cannotDeleteDesc: This court has active bookings. Please cancel all bookings first.
courts.deleteDesc: This action cannot be undone. The court and all its data will be permanently removed.

courtForm.addNewCourt: Add a new court to your venue
courtForm.courtRulesHint: These rules will be shown to players before they confirm their booking
courtForm.activeDesc: Inactive courts won't be available for booking

venueForm.activeDesc: Inactive venues won't appear in search results
venueForm.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this venue? This will also delete all associated courts.

availability.title: Availability
availability.subtitle: Configure your venue's opening hours and exceptions
availability.addCourtsFirst: Add courts first to configure availability.

weeklySchedule.title: Weekly Schedule
weeklySchedule.subtitle: Set your regular opening hours for each day of the week

dateOverrides.title: Exceptions & Overrides
dateOverrides.subtitle: Set closures or custom hours for specific dates
dateOverrides.closedDesc: Venue completely unavailable for bookings on this date
dateOverrides.customHoursDesc: Open with different hours than usual schedule

bookingConfig.title: Booking Settings
bookingConfig.subtitle: Configure time slot intervals and maximum booking duration
bookingConfig.slotIntervalDesc: The smallest bookable time unit (e.g., 30 = half-hour slots)
bookingConfig.maxBookingDesc: The longest continuous booking allowed (e.g., 120 = 2 hours)

preview.title: Live Preview
preview.subtitle: See exactly what customers will see when booking
preview.noSchedule: No weekly schedule configured. Set up your hours above.

bookings.title: Bookings
bookings.subtitle: View and manage all your venue bookings
bookings.noActiveBookingsDesc: Active bookings will appear here when customers book your venues.

reschedule.title: Reschedule Booking
reschedule.subtitle: Select a new date and time. The booking stays paid — no additional charge.
reschedule.noAvailableSlots: No available slots for this date

equipment.title: Equipment Rental
equipment.subtitle: Manage equipment available for hire at your venues
equipment.noVenuesDesc: You need to create a venue before adding equipment.
equipment.noEquipmentDesc: Add equipment that players can rent with their booking
equipment.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your profile and payment settings
settings.phoneHint: Displayed to players for court booking inquiries
settings.emailHint: Email is managed through your account settings
settings.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters long
settings.passwordsDontMatchDesc: New password and confirm password must be identical
settings.passwordTooShortDesc: New password must be at least 6 characters
settings.missingFieldsDesc: Please fill in all password fields
settings.incorrectPasswordDesc: Please check your current password and try again
settings.readyToReceiveDesc: Your Stripe account is fully configured. Payments from bookings will be transferred to your bank account.
settings.completeSetupDesc: Your Stripe account setup is incomplete. Click below to continue.
settings.stripeReason1: Receive court booking payments directly to your bank
settings.stripeReason2: Automatic payouts with transparent fee structure
settings.stripeReason3: View earnings and manage payouts from Stripe dashboard
settings.stripeConnectedDesc: Your account has been connected successfully.
settings.onboardingIncompleteDesc: Please complete the Stripe onboarding process.
settings.noVenuesDesc: Complete your Stripe account setup above first, then you'll be able to create venues and start accepting bookings.

staff.title: Staff Access
staff.subtitle: Add staff members and assign them to your venues
staff.noVenuesSelectedDesc: Please select at least one venue for the staff member
staff.passwordTooShortDesc: Password must be at least 6 characters

stripe.setupDescWithVenues: You must complete your Stripe account setup before you can add courts or configure availability. Go to Settings → Payment Payouts and complete the onboarding process.
stripe.setupDescNoVenues: You must set up your Stripe account first before you can create venues, add courts, or configure availability. Go to Settings → Payment Payouts to get started.

payment.title: Payment Settings
payment.subtitle: Configure when organizers need to pay for bookings
payment.beforeSessionDesc: Payment required before the session day
payment.hoursBeforeDesc: How many hours before the session should payment be completed?
payment.hoursBeforeExample: Example: If set to 24 hours and session is at 6 PM Monday, payment is due by 6 PM Sunday

facilities.title: Venue Facilities
facilities.subtitle: Select what facilities your venue offers, or add custom ones.
